subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter of 12 Dhi’l-Qa‘dih 1337 was received, but the earlier one hath not arrived
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه دوازدهم ذی القعده ۳۳۷ رسید اما نامه سابق نرسید مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael
